review_text: The service us terrible. the breakfst had insects lying around. the staff is not responsive to your request and comments i called the golf cart topick up to go to the restaurant but it took more than 15 mins to arrive need to keep on calling to get what you want. i asked them why it took so long and the response was the restaurant was actually very close to my room and i could walk there.cant believe they are doing this under the name of the luxury brand name yet it is very expensive

title: Unexpectedly a nightmare stay & worst experience ever
review_excerpt: Without any prejudice or discrimination i am honest with my feedback on my experience staying in Villa 47 Bulgari Hotel in Bali. It has a stunning views and food which cannot be dispute but the whole experience were a nightmare for us with it's service. I have been traveling a...
review_text: Without any prejudice or discrimination i am honest with my feedback on my experience staying in Villa 47 Bulgari Hotel in Bali. It has a stunning views and food which cannot be dispute but the whole experience were a nightmare for us with it's service. I have been traveling around the world staying in the best hotel around the world and this is the worst ever that i could imagine the hotel staff can't wait throwing us out from the room.I am so upset till i have to make such feedback on my experience. The room were full of mosquitoes which i am not sure any regular fogging has been carried out. Mosquitoes were buzzing around my head in the whole night even after spraying the mosquitoes repellant. Many switches in the villa were spoil. Air conditioning is not working and i was sweating the whole night and kept waking up till the next day i woke up feeling dizzy and terrible where i have to be on my land in Bali working with the Land officer & focus under the hot Bali sun for hours and hours. Woke up in the morning make a quick call to the reception for a late check out due to i have to leave the villa immediately because the land officer has already arrived at the land without any prior notice, Bulgari reception instead of understanding client’s need she insisted pushing us out by 12pm even having said that I suggested to her that I might not come back on time and it will be safer to extend till 3pm instead of 12pm or 130pm because I am being realistic in time for me to come back and take a quick shower and pack which will only takes 10mins. She said to me our people can come in to your villa and pack all your stuff for you before you come back & leaving it at the concierge if i am unable to pack my things in time and you can shower at our outdoor area or spa area that sounded to me like throwing us out from the villa totally without considering our position at that point of time. So rude and not interested to empathize with client’s needs for that few hours of check out time. This is not a standard business city hotel , it is 7 star client experience hotel. I have no choice but to leave the villa immediately , when I left the villa i saw 2 empty wine bottles , wine glasses and broken glasses by the monkey in the morning were all over the floor including the roof top leaves mess on the floor. As expected we came back late due to the measurement, whole body in a mess walking in the bush, sweaty, headache, no energy and hot after measuring the land under the hot sun and hungry. We then stop by the restaurant and we ordered food and the reception at the restaurant came to us and start mentioning to us as in rushing us out from the villa after we have been super tired and hungry. After lunch we immediately go back to the villa , arrived looking at the mess outside the room 2 empty wine bottles, broken glasses on the floor, wine glasses and roof top leaves were all still on the floor meaning that no one actually came in to make up the room the whole morning. Went into our room everything is in a mess with 4 workers inside keeping everything , bedsheets all over the place, in the toilet collecting towels and so on treating us invisible with no care about us coming back into the villa whether we need privacy in order to have a quick shower or change & pack in 10mins, while we were brushing teeth the staff was standing in front of the basin not moving at all, went to the toilet , toilet papers were kept , went to shower left a bottle of conditioner on the floor and keep all the shampoos and body shower gel, Everything is in a mess that I could not recognize where my belonging were left before I leave the villa in the morning in urgency. We were very upset and requested to see the GM and he came to the villa with a sour face as in we were wasting his time after we specifically asking him to come so that we could feedback such a first time experience with Bulgari for their improvements, for a 7 star hotel which is more of a standard 3 star business city hotel , instead of like other 5-7 stars hotel that we have been around the world which provides solutions and suggestions comfortably to accommodate client’s needs if it is really inconvenience the clients. 4 days after returning back home I just realized that I have a very important book that I left on the side of the bed and due to the mess created by the house keeping around the bed area the book was covered underneath bedsheets and left behind without being returned to the lost and found dept. I called and someone by the name of Andara picked up the call and told me he will call me back after checking with lost and found department. The book was clearly left behind in the room when i left and it was a very expensive finance book that i have been doing a research on . With no initiative to further check in a few minutes time the staff called back immediately and just say sorry we did not have any lost and found reported not even checking with me the location of the book or being responsible for the mess that has been created in the room where all location of my things that I have left in the room before leaving the villa in the morning were not easily found. I asked someone to call us and make refund because of the mess they created and no one even care to call. It means no one does any checking as well on the villa before the guest leaves . This is a totally unacceptable in a 7stars hotel and it brings an embarrassment and brand damage to such a luxury brand “BULGARI” . I only wish if they could be more responsible for what they have caused at least making an effort to purchase the same book and refund it back to us. It is not about the book but the responsibility and effort that one make in a service and hospitality business to gain trust among clients with the hotel and leave with a good image. I am speechless with unexpected nightmare stay with Bulgari in Bali. I just hope to get my book back

title: Not worth the price

review_text: Stayed at the very last day of our honeymoon after spending 4 nites at Komaneka Ubud on 2011. It is not worth the price. Pros: good view, good sound system, nice in-villa pool. Cons: compare to the local hotel we went, the service was worse, no sense of hospitality. the bathrooms was not that clean with dust under the basinz Some monkeys ate our juice.

At this price, we feel cheated!!

title: Awful services
review_excerpt: People who want the comfortable services, choose other hotels please. These were the worst services that I had experienced. First, when we got into the room, we found that the slippers were used. My mother thought it was disgusting. I tried to contact the butler to change the ...
review_text: People who want the comfortable services, choose other hotels please. These were the worst services that I had experienced. First, when we got into the room, we found that the slippers were used. My mother thought it was disgusting. I tried to contact the butler to change the slippers, but I failed because the mobile phone in the room did not work. Finally I used another telephone to reach the butler but I got the new slippers two hours later. That was quiet slow. In the other hotels, I always get my requests solved in 10 minutes. Second, we were out of water in the evening, I asked for several more and the turn down service. They showed up until my parents had gone to bed. Third, we got up at 5AM in that morning because of the early flight, so we want to go to bed early. Unfortunately, there was a party near our villa. They played music loudly. This was unacceptable. People who go to a resort were seeking for relax, peaceful life. The hotel told me they knew the villa near us would hold a party but I got no notification at check-in. I did not know why the hotel arrange us a villa near a party. It really made me sick. By the way, the main door lock of our villa was broke. It's difficult to open from inside. I had to jump down from the wall to get out to complain the party noise. The hotel service was not worth the money I paid definitely. I will warn all of my friends to avoid this hotel in Bali. The only person who care about the guest is the front desk manager, Giovanna. She did a good job to make me calm down.

title: Bad Experience
review_excerpt: I was in Bulgari Bali for my honeymoon in April 2018. We chose this hotel to end our trip with a flourish, since the infrastructure seemed to be amazing. We chose a vila with front seaview but our problems started on the very first day. Our villa stood right beside a house tha...
review_text: I was in Bulgari Bali for my honeymoon in April 2018. We chose this hotel to end our trip with a flourish, since the infrastructure seemed to be amazing. We chose a vila with front seaview but our problems started on the very first day. Our villa stood right beside a house that was rent for wedding parties during our stay. I went to Bulgari looking for peace and quiet, but during 4 days I had to put up with loud Withney Houston, Shakira and PitBull songs until 11pm followed by fireworks. As the nights were bad, we tried to enjoy the days. The worst part of my stay though was while laying naked by my private pool, when I saw a drone filming me and my husband in our privacy. We immediately called the lobby and they apologized for the situation but they said there as nothing they could do to prevent this type of incident. I dont work in the hotel business so I cant tell what should Bulgari have done for me. They only thing I can do is writing a review to let people know about this embarrassing situation so you can think twice before spending a bulk of money at Bulgari. For the records: restaurants are very good but breakfast is VERY poor with a lot of bread types but small offer os fruits, cheese, yogurt. For eggs, sausages and other you have to right to choose 1 option a day and they will bring it to the table. To be honest: Four Seasos is WAY BETTER in every aspect.

title: Over rated !
review_excerpt: The scenery is really fantastic. But that is just it. We were there for my cousin wedding. We booked weeks ahead and requested a twin bed, but upon check in, it is not available. They were kind enough to offer extra bed in the room. But looking at the bed they brought in, the ...
review_text: The scenery is really fantastic. But that is just it. We were there for my cousin wedding. We booked weeks ahead and requested a twin bed, but upon check in, it is not available. They were kind enough to offer extra bed in the room. But looking at the bed they brought in, the bed must have been older than the hotel itself (Should have take photo of the extra bed). Dirty, holes, and with springs that can give you back pain. The room is in great need of renovation. The wooden floor creaks when you walk, some of the wood is rotten and maybe is due to the rainy season, so the wood kind of expand and you need to give the door an extra kick to open it. The worst is at night, i must have killed over twenty mosquito and yet they still keep coming. In the morning, was awaken by monkeys jumping on the roof of the villas. It's something new i must say. Around and in the hotel, there is pretty much nothing to do. One final word, if you are not here on honeymoon, better find another hotel.

title: There are so many better options in Bali!
review_excerpt: My wife and I just back from a trip to Thailand and Bali. Of the 5 hotels we stayed(all in the same price range and service level of bulgari), Bulgari was our least favorite and most expensive. Our room would constantly leak every day. So, when we left in the morning there wou...
review_text: My wife and I just back from a trip to Thailand and Bali. Of the 5 hotels we stayed(all in the same price range and service level of bulgari), Bulgari was our least favorite and most expensive. Our room would constantly leak every day. So, when we left in the morning there would be a puddle of water in the bathroom. When we woke up in the morning, there would be a puddle of water in the bathroom. Every day for 3 days. In addition to this, there seemed to be more mosquitoes in our room than outside our room, I have to assume the water collection everyday had something to do with that. Lastly, the bed spread had blood on it. The blood was not ours and unfortunately we found it in the morning after sleeping with it the night before. In addition to the room, there seemed to be a lot of misunderstandings with the hotel staff. Granted, we speak English and this is probably a second language to most of the staff, but there just seemed to be a lot of things they didn't understand or miscues on their end that could have easily been avoided. Lastly, the overall price at the hotel was a lot more than all the other places we stayed at(2 4 seasons, peninsula and a COMO property). There are so many other options in Bali, that would just avoid Bulgary altogether. There beach isnt anything special, you cant even swim in their portion of the ocean. The only redeemable thing is their views, but you can get that same view at a few other hotels in the area.

title: Disappointing!
review_excerpt: We stayed at the Cliff Villa. It is just an ordinary resort with BVI toiletries. View and location was great but others was disappointing!! We were intruded by monkeys, ants and lice the last night.
review_text: We stayed at the Cliff Villa. It is just an ordinary resort with BVI toiletries. View and location was great but others was disappointing!! We were intruded by monkeys, ants and lice the last night.

title: Beware of the monkeys here!
review_excerpt: We planned a trip here and thought it would be a dream vacation. It turned out to be a nightmare. This resort is beautiful, and is in an incredible spot. However, we did not realize it was inhabited by monkeys, as the resort is built on a cliffside of a former jungle that has ...
review_text: We planned a trip here and thought it would be a dream vacation. It turned out to be a nightmare. This resort is beautiful, and is in an incredible spot. However, we did not realize it was inhabited by monkeys, as the resort is built on a cliffside of a former jungle that has been home to the monkey population forever. We rented a cliffside villa, #11, for the stunning views. It was unfortunately the favorite hang out place for a large clan of monkeys (around 20). They invaded our space, opened the sliding doors, trashed the place and ate all the food (coffee packets included!) We had to keep calling for help to chase them off. It made me so uneasy, and we felt like prisoners in our own villa. If you don't lock the doors (all the rooms are separate spaces) they will come in. One brave rather large monkey followed us right into the bedroom to retrieve some fruit, and then proceeded to eat it on the doorstep! You cannot move freely about this type of villa without being invaded and feeling very vulnerable. The staff there are lovely people, but there is very little they can do other than assist you and say they are sorry about the monkeys. My complaint is that we had no warning from the hotel, except a little card on the bedside table alerting us to the "local inhabitants" and said don't leave your belongings outside, as the monkeys will take things! I had no idea it would be the most stressful trip of my life. These monkeys can be aggressive and have been known to bite people for no reason. There are other villas where this is not as much of a problem. But, if you are renting cliffside, you have been warned! These monkeys also enjoy invading the restaurant at breakfast time. It was comical to a degree. The staff are used to chasing them off. Glorious end to our stay was when the brakes failed on one of the buggies (golf cart) used to cart us up the steep roads to the entrance of the resort. We nearly missed being thrown over a wall because the driver hit a wall as we were hurling backwards. Nothing like a bit of whiplash and a few scrapes to end your 5 star vacation. I cannot recommend this place!

title: Unexpectedly a nightmare stay & worst experience ever
review_excerpt: Without any prejudice or discrimination i am honest with my feedback on my experience staying in Villa 47 Bulgari Hotel in Bali. It has a stunning views and food which cannot be dispute but the whole experience were a nightmare for us with it's service. I have been traveling a...
review_text: Without any prejudice or discrimination i am honest with my feedback on my experience staying in Villa 47 Bulgari Hotel in Bali. It has a stunning views and food which cannot be dispute but the whole experience were a nightmare for us with it's service. I have been traveling around the world staying in the best hotel around the world and this is the worst ever that i could imagine the hotel staff can't wait throwing us out from the room.I am so upset till i have to make such feedback on my experience. The room were full of mosquitoes which i am not sure any regular fogging has been carried out. Mosquitoes were buzzing around my head in the whole night even after spraying the mosquitoes repellant. Many switches in the villa were spoil. Air conditioning is not working and i was sweating the whole night and kept waking up till the next day i woke up feeling dizzy and terrible where i have to be on my land in Bali working with the Land officer & focus under the hot Bali sun for hours and hours. Woke up in the morning make a quick call to the reception for a late check out due to i have to leave the villa immediately because the land officer has already arrived at the land without any prior notice, Bulgari reception instead of understanding client’s need she insisted pushing us out by 12pm even having said that I suggested to her that I might not come back on time and it will be safer to extend till 3pm instead of 12pm or 130pm because I am being realistic in time for me to come back and take a quick shower and pack which will only takes 10mins. She said to me our people can come in to your villa and pack all your stuff for you before you come back & leaving it at the concierge if i am unable to pack my things in time and you can shower at our outdoor area or spa area that sounded to me like throwing us out from the villa totally without considering our position at that point of time. So rude and not interested to empathize with client’s needs for that few hours of check out time. This is not a standard business city hotel , it is 7 star client experience hotel. I have no choice but to leave the villa immediately , when I left the villa i saw 2 empty wine bottles , wine glasses and broken glasses by the monkey in the morning were all over the floor including the roof top leaves mess on the floor. As expected we came back late due to the measurement, whole body in a mess walking in the bush, sweaty, headache, no energy and hot after measuring the land under the hot sun and hungry. We then stop by the restaurant and we ordered food and the reception at the restaurant came to us and start mentioning to us as in rushing us out from the villa after we have been super tired and hungry. After lunch we immediately go back to the villa , arrived looking at the mess outside the room 2 empty wine bottles, broken glasses on the floor, wine glasses and roof top leaves were all still on the floor meaning that no one actually came in to make up the room the whole morning. Went into our room everything is in a mess with 4 workers inside keeping everything , bedsheets all over the place, in the toilet collecting towels and so on treating us invisible with no care about us coming back into the villa whether we need privacy in order to have a quick shower or change & pack in 10mins, while we were brushing teeth the staff was standing in front of the basin not moving at all, went to the toilet , toilet papers were kept , went to shower left a bottle of conditioner on the floor and keep all the shampoos and body shower gel, Everything is in a mess that I could not recognize where my belonging were left before I leave the villa in the morning in urgency. We were very upset and requested to see the GM and he came to the villa with a sour face as in we were wasting his time after we specifically asking him to come so that we could feedback such a first time experience with Bulgari for their improvements, for a 7 star hotel which is more of a standard 3 star business city hotel , instead of like other 5-7 stars hotel that we have been around the world which provides solutions and suggestions comfortably to accommodate client’s needs if it is really inconvenience the clients. 4 days after returning back home I just realized that I have a very important book that I left on the side of the bed and due to the mess created by the house keeping around the bed area the book was covered underneath bedsheets and left behind without being returned to the lost and found dept. I called and someone by the name of Andara picked up the call and told me he will call me back after checking with lost and found department. The book was clearly left behind in the room when i left and it was a very expensive finance book that i have been doing a research on . With no initiative to further check in a few minutes time the staff called back immediately and just say sorry we did not have any lost and found reported not even checking with me the location of the book or being responsible for the mess that has been created in the room where all location of my things that I have left in the room before leaving the villa in the morning were not easily found. I asked someone to call us and make refund because of the mess they created and no one even care to call. It means no one does any checking as well on the villa before the guest leaves . This is a totally unacceptable in a 7stars hotel and it brings an embarrassment and brand damage to such a luxury brand “BULGARI” . I only wish if they could be more responsible for what they have caused at least making an effort to purchase the same book and refund it back to us. It is not about the book but the responsibility and effort that one make in a service and hospitality business to gain trust among clients with the hotel and leave with a good image. I am speechless with unexpected nightmare stay with Bulgari in Bali. I just hope to get my book back
